scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @constructive-io/ui build && pnpm --filter @constructive-io/data build && pnpm --filter @constructive-io/sheets build && pnpm --filter @constructive-io/schema-builder build
scripts.build:pages: pnpm build:packages && pnpm build:registry && pnpm --filter blocks build:pages && pnpm pages:artifact
scripts.check: pnpm check:runtime && pnpm check:public && pnpm lint:scripts && pnpm --filter blocks check:flows && pnpm --filter blocks check:selections && pnpm lint:types && pnpm test
scripts.check:full: pnpm check && pnpm build:storybook && pnpm build:registry && pnpm check:registry-contract && pnpm --filter @constructive-io/registry smoke:install && pnpm pack:check
